text: Esports Manager 2026 Announces Release Date — IGN Live 2026

author: IGN RSS
text:
How Gothic Remake Works to Give You an Especially Immersive Open World | IGN Live 2026
At IGN Live today, THQ Nordic's Reinhard Pollice was on hand to discuss the newly released remake of Gothic. 
The original Gothic, or Gothic Classic as Pollice said they now referred to it, celebrates its 25th anniversary this year. Even before the remake, the original had been remastered, and Pollice said he felt the reason for Gothic's longevity was "even by today's standards, it's still a very unique game with a lot of game mechanics that really hold up." He also said he felt "It's not the biggest open world, but I think it's the most immersive and the most alive."

author: IGN RSS
text:
1666: Amsterdam Creator on the Game's Timelines... and Playing as a Cat! | IGN Live 2026
On the heels of the release of a playable 30-minute demo, 1666: Amsterdam creator Patrice Désilets took to the stage at IGN Live today to discuss the game he fought so hard to complete. 1666: Amsterdam's infamously long development process took over 15 years, which included both the game and Destilets spending time at multiple companies, before he was able to secure the rights back to finally complete his labor of love.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Star Wars: Zero Company Creators Talk Canon, Character Customization and More | IGN Live 2026
Fresh off the debut of the big Official Story Trailer, the Force was felt at IGN Live Sunday with a panel for Star Wars: Zero Company featuring Director Greg Foertsch and Lead Designer James Brawley. 
The upcoming single-player turn-based tactics game is set in the twilight of the Clone Wars and Foertsch elaborated how you play against (and within) the backdrop of the Clone Wars, not so much directly immersed in them. "There's so many things going on. Lots of different backroom dealing, lots of politics at play. While the Clone Wars is happening, there's this other war happening beneath the war."

author: IGN RSS
text:
Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution Are 'Not Timed Exclusives,' Xbox Says — So They'll Never Launch on PlayStation
Xbox has clarified that Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution are now full console exclusives — and won't arrive on PlayStation, even at a later date.

author: IGN RSS
text:
State of Decay 3 Confirmed for PS5 as Undead Labs Stops Short of Delivering Release Date
State of Decay 3 will launch for both PS5 and Xbox Series X | S when it arrives sometime in 2027.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4's Gritty Extraction Mode, DMZ, Gets First Gameplay
Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4's extraction mode, DMZ, has been revealed with an extensive first look.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Clockwork Revolution Confirmed as Xbox Console Exclusive With 2027 Launch
Clockwork Revolution re-emerged at the Xbox Games Showcase 2026 to confirm it will launch in 2027 as an Xbox console exclusive.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Persona 6 Announced, Coming to Xbox Game Pass
Persona 6 is real, and coming to Xbox Game Pass when it does arrive.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Spyro: A Realm Beyond Announced, Features 'True Dragon Flight'
Toys for Bob revealed Spyro: A Realm Beyond during Xbox Games Showcase with a short teaser trailer and a glimpse of gameplay. This is the first original Spyro game in nearly 20 years, and it features the return of Tom Kenny as the voice of Spyro and a first in the series: "true dragon flight."

author: IGN RSS
text:
Xbox Series X Translucent Green 25th Anniversary Edition Console and Controller Announced, Inspired by the Original Xbox
Microsoft has announced a new limited edition Xbox Series X console variant inspired by the original Xbox.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Doom: The Dark Ages Revelations DLC Revealed With New Spear Weapon and July Release Date
Bethesda and id Software have revealed a first look at Doom: The Dark Ages Revelations, a new campaign DLC release that’s coming to PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X | S with a July 7, 2026, release date.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Sega Announces Crazy Taxi: World Tour, Coming to PC and Consoles in 2027
Sega has announced Crazy Taxi: World Tour, its long-teased franchise revival that's now coming in 2027.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Senua, Sequel to Hellblade 2, Revealed for 2027 Release
Senua, a more gameplay-driven sequel to the Hellblade series, has been announced as part of the Xbox Games Showcase.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Persona 4 Revival Reveals February 2027 Release Date
Persona 4 Revival snuck into the Xbox Games Showcase 2026 to confirm it has a release date of February 18, 2027.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Halo: Campaign Evolved Reveals New Space Combat Missions, Imminent Release Date
A new trailer for Halo: Campaign Evolved confirmed the game's release date and showed a new look at the three brand-new missions for the game.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Fable Trailer Reveals Release Date, Hayley Atwell as Its Villain
Xbox's Fable reboot now has a confirmed 2027 release date — and a fresh trailer has revealed Marvel star Hayley Atwell will play its villain.
